Subject: Q3 Investor Update Draft for Review

Please review the attached draft of the Q3 investor update by EOD tomorrow. I’ve incorporated the latest portfolio performance metrics and the notes from Marta Keller’s feedback last week. Key focus areas are the underperformance in the Nordic retail segment and the recent uplift in the DACH industrials—both need clear, concise explanations.

Reference materials are here: https://internal.northwindcapital.com/strategy/quarterly-updates

Marek Berger

Key takeaways:
- Volatility spikes under the 2008 crisis scenario remain within our 15% VaR threshold, but the liquidity buffer dips slightly below Basel III requirements in two cases.
- The CDS trend analysis (p. 12-14) shows elevated default probabilities for two counterparties—flagged for further review.

Could you take a look and let me know if you’d like to adjust any assumptions before I present to Felix on Thursday? Also, Iris mentioned she’d need the raw data for her compliance audit, so I’ll loop her in once we align.

Thanks,
Marek Berger
